## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's AI-powered content creation services for TrueLook's SEO and LLM visibility needs.](https://fathom.video/share/Rb1m7cNvW6HjYuFuecr8Vvu7rFxk6Wxm?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers end-to-end AI-driven content creation, from strategy to publishing, with human expertise for quality control](https://fathom.video/share/Rb1m7cNvW6HjYuFuecr8Vvu7rFxk6Wxm?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [TrueLook seeks to improve keyword rankings, LLM visibility, and content quality/quantity beyond current agency capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/Rb1m7cNvW6HjYuFuecr8Vvu7rFxk6Wxm?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
  - [GrowthX's process includes a strategy sprint to develop tailored artifacts, followed by scalable content production with minimal manual work from TrueLook](https://fathom.video/share/Rb1m7cNvW6HjYuFuecr8Vvu7rFxk6Wxm?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
  - [Pricing quoted at $12K/month with a 12-month commitment, earliest start date end of October due to high demand](https://fathom.video/share/Rb1m7cNvW6HjYuFuecr8Vvu7rFxk6Wxm?tab=summary&timestamp=766.0)

## Topics

### Current Content Creation Process at TrueLook

  - [Working with SEO agency producing 4 blogs/month](https://fathom.video/share/Rb1m7cNvW6HjYuFuecr8Vvu7rFxk6Wxm?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
  - [Manual review and editing process by Lauren](https://fathom.video/share/Rb1m7cNvW6HjYuFuecr8Vvu7rFxk6Wxm?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Challenges with keyword rankings and LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/Rb1m7cNvW6HjYuFuecr8Vvu7rFxk6Wxm?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
  - [Issues with AI-generated content sounding "regurgitated"](https://fathom.video/share/Rb1m7cNvW6HjYuFuecr8Vvu7rFxk6Wxm?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [Lack of transparency in agency's AI usage](https://fathom.video/share/Rb1m7cNvW6HjYuFuecr8Vvu7rFxk6Wxm?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)

### GrowthX's Content Creation Approach

  - [End-to-end service: strategy, creation, staging, and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/Rb1m7cNvW6HjYuFuecr8Vvu7rFxk6Wxm?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [AI workflows combined with human expertise (SEO, content marketing)](https://fathom.video/share/Rb1m7cNvW6HjYuFuecr8Vvu7rFxk6Wxm?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)
  - [Focus on creating depth and breadth of content for AI search visibility](https://fathom.video/share/Rb1m7cNvW6HjYuFuecr8Vvu7rFxk6Wxm?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)
  - [Customized artifacts (personas, writing guidelines, company context)](https://fathom.video/share/Rb1m7cNvW6HjYuFuecr8Vvu7rFxk6Wxm?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
  - [Transparent process with detailed workflows (research, fact-checking, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/Rb1m7cNvW6HjYuFuecr8Vvu7rFxk6Wxm?tab=summary&timestamp=981.0)
  - [Content refreshes included in the service](https://fathom.video/share/Rb1m7cNvW6HjYuFuecr8Vvu7rFxk6Wxm?tab=summary&timestamp=1211.0)

### Technical Aspects and Integration

  - [GrowthX team handles WordPress staging and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/Rb1m7cNvW6HjYuFuecr8Vvu7rFxk6Wxm?tab=summary&timestamp=1337.0)
  - [Collaboration on initial CMS setup and formatting](https://fathom.video/share/Rb1m7cNvW6HjYuFuecr8Vvu7rFxk6Wxm?tab=summary&timestamp=1363.0)
  - [Analytics and monitoring for AI mentions, citations, and search rankings](https://fathom.video/share/Rb1m7cNvW6HjYuFuecr8Vvu7rFxk6Wxm?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
  - [Use of tools like Scrunch for LLM visibility tracking](https://fathom.video/share/Rb1m7cNvW6HjYuFuecr8Vvu7rFxk6Wxm?tab=summary&timestamp=1532.0)
  - [Communication via Slack, content management in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/Rb1m7cNvW6HjYuFuecr8Vvu7rFxk6Wxm?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)

### Additional Services and Considerations

  - [Focus on editorial content rather than manual backlink building](https://fathom.video/share/Rb1m7cNvW6HjYuFuecr8Vvu7rFxk6Wxm?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
  - [Possibility of programmatic SEO projects (one at a time)](https://fathom.video/share/Rb1m7cNvW6HjYuFuecr8Vvu7rFxk6Wxm?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)
  - [No change in quoted pricing ($12K/month) despite recent price increases](https://fathom.video/share/Rb1m7cNvW6HjYuFuecr8Vvu7rFxk6Wxm?tab=summary&timestamp=1747.0)

## Next Steps

  - [TrueLook to review the sample Statement of Work (SOW)](https://fathom.video/share/Rb1m7cNvW6HjYuFuecr8Vvu7rFxk6Wxm?tab=summary&timestamp=1736.0)
  - [TrueLook to decide on moving forward with the 12-month commitment](https://fathom.video/share/Rb1m7cNvW6HjYuFuecr8Vvu7rFxk6Wxm?tab=summary&timestamp=1772.0)
  - [If interested, TrueLook to confirm to reserve a kickoff date (earliest available: end of October)](https://fathom.video/share/Rb1m7cNvW6HjYuFuecr8Vvu7rFxk6Wxm?tab=summary&timestamp=1766.0)
  - [GrowthX to resend the sample SOW link to Allison](https://fathom.video/share/Rb1m7cNvW6HjYuFuecr8Vvu7rFxk6Wxm?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [TrueLook team to prepare any existing documentation on products/services for potential artifact creation](https://fathom.video/share/Rb1m7cNvW6HjYuFuecr8Vvu7rFxk6Wxm?tab=summary&timestamp=1701.0)
